titleStmt.title: SII 9.293: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 293. (A.R. No. 113 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE BHIMESVARA TEMPLE AT NILAGUNDA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated the cyclic year Chitrabhānu, Pushya, śu. 10, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. It belongs to the reign of the Kalachurya king, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, Bhujabalachakravarti Bijjaladēva. Chitrabhānu in the reign of Bijjala was Śaka 1084 corresponding to A.D. 1162; but the week-day would be wrong for that year; nor did the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti fall on the day cited. The king's feudatory, Tribhuvanamalla-Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva who had the title “lord of Kāñchīpura” is stated to have been ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred and Kaḍambaḷike one-thousand. Under Vīra-Pāṇḍya's orders Kallimayya, the Superintendent of tolls (Suṅkad-adhishṭhāyaka) in Kōgaḷi and Kaḍambaḷike, made a grant of a fixed portion of the tollrevenue in Nīrugunda, the chief town of Kōgaḷi five-hundred, for the service of the god Bhīmēśvaradēva in the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
viṣuddhajñānadēhāya�trivēdīdibyacakṣuṣē . śrīyaḥprāptinimittāya namassōmārddhadhāriṇē .
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷaṁjarapuravarādhīśvara suvarṇnavriṣabhadhva
ja ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇa kaḷacuryyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa kadanapracaṇḍa mānakanakācaḷa
subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkuśagajasāmaṁta śāraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara pratāpalaṁkēśvara paranārīsahō
daraṁ caladaṁkarāma vairībhaka(ṁ)ṇṭhīravaṁ śanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla niśśaṁka nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalla bhujabaḷacakravartti bijjaladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mā
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvara kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakama
ḷamārttaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍa rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁga śrītribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgi śrīmattribhu
vanamalla vīrapāṇḍyadēvaru noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāsirakke taleyenisida kōgaḷiyaynūṟu
maṁ kaḍaṁbaḷike sāyiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipālana māḍi sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadi rājyageyyuttamire . © . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . mudrādhikāri ripukuḷavi
drāvaṇanakhiḷabāṁdhavārtthijanakalpadrumānavadyaguṇayutanadrīṁdrasutāpriyāṁ
ghrikamaḷabhramaraṁ . kalidēvadaṇḍanāthaṁ kalikāḷakaḷaṁkarahitanatiśayamahimaṁ calada(ṁ)
bhujabalada cāgada neleyene negaḻdaṁ samastavasudhātaḷadoḷu . Ene negardda kallimayya ja
napati śrīvīrapāṁḍyadēvara besadiṁ vinutaṁ noṇaṁbavāḍiyoḷanunayadi suṁkadādhipatyadoḷirddu
Oḍaluṁ dhanamuṁ bhāvise keḍalirddavu kiḍadakasavaradharmmamada paḍeveṁ beccarameṁde
ḍe vuḍugade taddharmmakāryyatatparanāgi . © . svasti samastapraśastisahita śrīma
nmahāpradhāna suṁkadadhiṣṭhāyaka kallimayyadaṁḍanāyaka kōgaḷi
yaynūṟu kaḍaṁbaḷike sāyirada hejjuṁka vaḍḍarāvuḷa pannāyada suṁkadadhikā
radoḷirddu śrīmaccitrabhānusaṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 10 Ādityavāra Uttarā
yaṇasaṁkrānti byatīpāta kūḍida mahātithiyalu kōgaḷiya
ynūṟakkaṁ modalenisida śrīmanmahāgrahāra nīruguṁdada śrīsva
yaṁbhu bhīmēśvaradēvara naṁdādīvigegamaṁgabhōganivēdyakkaṁ Ā sthaḷada Ā
vupaṁnadaḍake lakka Oṁdake śrīvīrapāṁḍyadēvara maṭhediṁ biṭṭa hāgavoṁdu
I dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavarige prayāgevāraṇāsiArggyatīrthaveṁba tī
rtthaṁgaḷalu sāsirvvarccaturvvēdigaḷappa brāhmaṇarige sāsira kavi
leyaṁ sūryyagrahaṇadalu koṭṭa phala I dharmmavaṁ keḍisi
davarige Ā tīrtthaṁgaḷalu Ābrāhmaṇaruvanā kavileyma vadhisida pāpa
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla
nīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sārvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthavēṁdrānu bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . © .
Digital edition of SII 9.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
